decks.notes: This Boros Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent while controlling the battlefield with removal spells and disruptive cards like Mana Tithe and Static Prison. The deck also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to generate card advantage and provide additional threats. With a mix of aggressive creatures and versatile spells, this deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The deck is focused on utilizing artifacts and synergies to quickly overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and disruptive spells. It aims to control the board with artifact removal and disruption while deploying threats like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Pinnacle Emissary that can quickly close out the game. The deck also utilizes mana efficiency with cards like Mox Opal and Urza's Saga to accelerate its game plan and maintain a strong board presence. Overall, the strategy combines aggressive creature play with artifact synergy to create a fast and powerful deck.

The deck focuses on assembling a toolbox of creatures that work together to create powerful combos. By utilizing cards like Devoted Druid, Vizier of Remedies, Delighted Halfling, and Walking Ballista, the deck is able to generate infinite mana and create a lethal board presence. Green Sun's Zenith and Nature's Rhythm help to search for key pieces of the combo, while Malevolent Rumble and Agatha's Soul Cauldron provide disruption and protection. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its synergistic creature interactions and win the game through a powerful combo finish.

This deck revolves around aggressive play utilizing The Underworld Cookbook to churn out value and set up powerful plays. The deck includes cards that can be sacrificed for various effects, and uses cards like Persist and Archon of Cruelty to create powerful board states. Mox Opal helps ramp up mana while cards like Ovalchase Daredevil and Faithless Looting provide additional card advantage. With a mix of aggro creatures and disruption, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and seize control of the game.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays and the use of blink effects to gain advantage over opponents. The deck includes a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and powerful creatures that benefit from being blinked. By utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Teferi, Time Raveler, players can repeatedly blink powerful creatures like Starfield Shepherd and Solitude to control the battlefield and overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes a variety of enchantments that provide additional value when blinked, making it a versatile and powerful aggro deck in the Modern format.

The main idea behind this deck is to use the Broodscale Bloodchief as the key combo piece to generate value and overwhelm opponents. By using cards like Urza's Saga, Blade of the Bloodchief, and Malevolent Rumble, along with support from creatures like Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker, the deck aims to create a powerful board state and control the game. With efficient removal spells like Unholy Heat and Kozilek's Command, as well as versatile cards like Walking Ballista and Emrakul, the Promised End, this deck can adapt to various situations and outmaneuver opponents.

This deck focuses on ramping up quickly to drop powerful Eldrazi creatures onto the battlefield, while also controlling the opponent's board with spells like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble. The key strategy is to accelerate mana production with cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Turntimber Symbiosis, allowing for the early deployment of massive threats like Emrakul, the Promised End. With a mix of ramp and control elements, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its powerful Eldrazi creatures before they can mount a strong defense.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly assemble artifacts on the battlefield and utilize cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mishra's Bauble to generate card advantage and control the board. With a focus on tempo and disruption, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary, while also utilizing cards like Tormod's Crypt and Engineered Explosives to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By efficiently utilizing artifacts and synergies, this deck aims to close out games quickly and efficiently.

Utilize the power of Eldrazi creatures to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive plays and disrupt their strategy with cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Glaring Fleshraker. The deck aims to establish board presence quickly with cards like It That Heralds the End and Sire of Seven Deaths, while using cards like Chalice of the Void to control the game. Eldrazi Temple and Cavern of Souls provide mana acceleration and fixing, allowing you to cast your powerful creatures ahead of schedule. Overall, the strategy revolves around fast, creature-based aggression with disruptive elements to control the game.

The deck focuses on using Shardless Agent to cascade into Living End, a powerful combo that allows the player to bring back all of their creatures from the graveyard while clearing the opponent's board. The deck also includes various creatures and spells to control the game until the combo can be executed, with cards like Force of Negation and Endurance to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Additionally, the deck includes powerful finishers like Overlord of the Balemurk and Colossal Skyturtle to close out the game once the combo has been set up.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with key creatures and then bring them back into play using reanimator spells like Unearth and Persist. Archon of Cruelty, Emperor of Bones, and Abhorrent Oculus are key targets for reanimation. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the game and protect the combo. Faithless Looting helps dig through the deck to find the combo pieces, while Psychic Frog provides additional value and card selection. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and control elements.

The main concept of this deck is to use powerful reanimation spells like Unearth and Persist to bring back high-impact creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones from the graveyard. By using discard cards like Thoughtseize and Faithless Looting to fill the graveyard with creatures, and control elements like Fatal Push and Spell Pierce to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to quickly assemble a lethal board presence and overwhelm the opponent before they can respond. The deck's strategy revolves around fast and explosive combos to win the game.

This Modern deck focuses on aggressive plays with a diverse array of creatures and instant removal spells. By utilizing cards like Scion of Draco, Ragavan, and Territorial Kavu, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with early threats. The inclusion of Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding helps control the game and protect the creatures on the board. The deck also features some disruptive elements like Stubborn Denial and Quantum Riddler to disrupt opponent's strategies. Overall, the deck aims to establish early board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The main concept of this Aggro - Affinity deck is to quickly put powerful artifacts onto the battlefield, such as Mox Opal and Urza's Saga, and use them in combination with cards like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to generate a strong board presence and put pressure on the opponent. By utilizing efficient mana sources and artifact synergies, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and disruptive tactics, while also having some control elements with cards like Metallic Rebuke and Engineered Explosives to maintain its advantage.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to aggressively control the battlefield with efficient creatures while using spells and abilities to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck includes powerful threats like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with support cards like Goblin Bombardment and Thraben Charm to maintain board presence and pressure the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Blood Moon and Static Prison further disrupt the opponent's strategy, making it difficult for them to mount a defense against the relentless assault of this aggressive deck.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with damage. The key strategy is to play efficient creatures like Ragavan and Guide of Souls to maintain early pressure, while using burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to finish off the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and The Legend of Roku provide additional support and versatility to adapt to different board states. The deck includes a mix of removal, token generation, and card advantage to maintain a strong board presence and apply consistent pressure throughout the game.
